name: Oven Cheese and Spinach Fondue
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Remove crusts from bread and cut into cubes.
3. Beat eggs, milk, and seasonings together in a bowl.
4. Stir in bread cubes, cheese, onion, and spinach.
5. Pour mixture into a lightly greased baking dish.
6. Bake uncovered for 1 hour or until the center is set.
7. Serve immediately. Enjoy!
